text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. First, I drink a glass of water, then I do ten minutes of stretching. After a quick shower, I have a simple breakfast of oatmeal and coffee. By 8:00, I start my work-from-home job, which involves emails and virtual meetings. I take a short lunch break at noon. At 5:00 PM, I go for a 30-minute run or do yoga to stay active. In the evening, I cook dinner, watch a show, and read before bed at 10:30. This routine keeps me balanced and productive.
